top_signals.title: US plans to shrink forces available to NATO during crises, sources say
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration is planning to shrink the pool of U.S. military capabilities available to assist NATO's European nations in a major crisis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. indicts seven Chinese over shipping container conspiracy
top_signals.summary: The indicted companies manufacture about 95% of the world's standard dry shipping containers, and the alleged scheme impacted some $35 billion in commerce, officials said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
